title: Publish events, not commands, for decoupling
description: Producers emit facts about what happened; consumers decide reactions, so producers stay unaware of subscribers.
body: Use when designing what to put on the bus. Do not encode a specific consumer's action (SendWelcomeEmail) as the message, which recouples the producer to that consumer. Actions: publish a domain fact (UserRegistered) carrying the data consumers need; let each consumer own its reaction and subscription; keep the event named in past tense and free of consumer intent. Validation signals include adding a new consumer without touching the producer and a test that the producer emits the same fact regardless of subscribers. Risk boundary: command-shaped events leak orchestration into producers and erode the decoupling the bus exists to provide.
